query: SELECT u.name, u.role, up.plan, up.isActive FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_plans up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Pessoa Teste%' OR u.name LIKE '%Teste%' LIMIT 5;
